allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Alejandro\\Desktop\\Scan" -Depth 2 | Select-Object -Property Name, FullName | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne '.next' -and $_.Name -ne 'node_modules' -and $_.Name -ne '.claude' } | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.FullName })

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./node_modules/@zxing/browser/package.json'\); console.log\('browser:', p.version\); const l = require\('./node_modules/@zxing/library/package.json'\); console.log\('library:', l.version\); const t = require\('./node_modules/tesseract.js/package.json'\); console.log\('tesseract:', t.version\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/@zxing/browser/esm/BrowserCodeReader.js', 'utf8'\); const lines = src.split\('\\n'\); const idx = lines.findIndex\(l => l.includes\('decodeFromVideoElement'\)\); console.log\(lines.slice\(idx, idx+15\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const src = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('./node_modules/@zxing/browser/esm/common/BrowserCodeReader.js','utf8'\); const lines = src.split\('\\n'\); const idx = lines.findIndex\(l => l.includes\('decodeFromVideoElement'\)\); console.log\(lines.slice\(idx, idx+20\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/@zxing/browser/esm/index.js','utf8'\); const lines = src.split\('\\n'\); const idx = lines.findIndex\(l => l.includes\('decodeFromCanvas'\)\); console.log\(lines.slice\(idx, idx+15\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/@zxing/browser/esm/readers/BrowserCodeReader.js','utf8'\).slice\(0, 5000\); console.log\(src\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/@zxing/browser/esm/readers/BrowserCodeReader.js','utf8'\); const idx = src.indexOf\('decodeFromCanvas'\); console.log\(src.slice\(idx, idx+400\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('./node_modules/@zxing/browser/esm/readers/BrowserCodeReader.js','utf8'\); const idx = src.indexOf\('BrowserCodeReader.prototype.decodeFromCanvas'\); console.log\(src.slice\(idx, idx+300\)\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\Alejandro\\Desktop\\Scan" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules|\\.next|\\.git" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\("C:\\Users\\Alejandro\\Desktop\\Scan\\", ""\) } | Sort-Object)
